title: tectaria pulchra
intro: Tectaria pulchra, also known as the beautiful fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria pulchra include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Tinctures, infusions, and decoctions are common herbal preparations made from the plant, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
